title: Tanium security advisory (AV26-673)
description: On July 7, 2026, Tanium published a security advisory to address a vulnerability in the following products:
products: Tanium Server 2025H1 Release  versions prior to Update MR21 (v7.7.3.8298)
Tanium Server 2025H2 Release  versions prior to Update MR11 (v7.8.2.1198)
Tanium Server 2026H1 Release  versions prior to Update MR3 (v7.8.4.1327)
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
